goal: Add a 15-minute offline BYO-agent assurance quickstart and local demo command for Issue #3509.
scope: Add the demo runner, package script, quickstart documentation, example README, and tests needed to generate local reviewer-first assurance artifacts without external agent or GitHub API calls.

assumptions.text: The package.json change is limited to a new demo script entrypoint and does not modify dependency declarations or lockfiles.
The demo remains offline after pnpm dependencies are installed and does not require a GitHub token, hosted LLM API, or live PR.
Producer output is treated only as evidence input; generated policy output remains report-only for ordinary fast-lane changes.

verificationPlan.name: Demo runner and aggregate-lanes regression tests
Docs and Context Pack validation
verificationPlan.command: pnpm -s run check:doc-consistency && pnpm -s run docs:lint && pnpm -s run context-pack:validate && pnpm -s run context-pack:verify-boundary-map

rollbackPlan: Revert the quickstart/demo commit and this plan artifact commit; remove generated demo artifacts from any local artifacts directory if present.
notes: package.json is classified as high-risk by policy because it is a package manifest, but this change only adds a script entrypoint.
run-security is requested so the policy label requirement for package manifest changes can be satisfied.
